pokemon:weepinbell.name: Weepinbell
pokemon:weepinbell.summary: Weepinbell has a large hook on its rear end. At night, the Pokémon hooks on to a tree branch and goes to sleep. If it moves around in its sleep, it may wake up to find itself on the ground.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Weepinbell has a large hook on its rear end. At night, the Pokémon hooks on to a tree branch and goes to sleep. If it moves around in its sleep, it may wake up to find itself on the ground.
A Pokémon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder.
A Pokémon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder.
It spits out POISONPOWDER to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of ACID.
When it's hungry, it swings its razor-sharp leaves, slicing up any unlucky object nearby for food.
A Pokémon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder.
At night, a WEEPINBELL hangs on to a tree branch with its hooked rear and sleeps. If it moves around in its sleep, it may wake up to find itself on the ground.
The leafy parts act as cutters for slashing foes. It spits a fluid that dissolves everything.
Even though it is filled with ACID, it does not melt because it also oozes a neutral­ izing fluid.
Even though it is filled with acid, it does not melt because it also oozes a protective fluid.
It spits out POISONPOWDER to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of ACID.
When hungry, it swallows anything that moves. Its hapless prey is dissolved by strong acids.
When hungry, it swallows anything that moves. Its hapless prey is dissolved by strong acids.
Weepinbell has a large hook on its rear end. At night, the Pokémon hooks on to a tree branch and goes to sleep. If it moves around in its sleep, it may wake up to find itself on the ground.
A Pokémon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder.
A Pokémon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder.
It spits out POISONPOWDER to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of ACID.
WEEPINBELL has a large hook on its rear end. At night, the POKéMON hooks on to a tree branch and goes to sleep. If it moves around in its sleep, it may wake up to find itself on the ground.
WEEPINBELL has a large hook on its rear end. At night, the POKéMON hooks on to a tree branch and goes to sleep. If it moves around in its sleep, it may wake up to find itself on the ground.
If its prey is bigger than its mouth, it slices up the victim with sharp leaves, then eats every morsel.
If its prey is bigger than its mouth, it slices up the victim with sharp leaves, then eats every morsel.
A Pokémon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder.
A Pokémon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder.
The leafy parts act as cutters for slashing foes. It spits a fluid that dissolves everything.
It spits out Poison Powder to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of Acid.
When hungry, it swallows anything that moves. Its hapless prey is melted inside by strong acids.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Weepinbell has a large hook on its rear end. At night, the Pokémon hooks on to a tree branch and goes to sleep. If it moves around in its sleep, it may wake up to find itself on the ground.

pokemon:bellsprout.name: Bellsprout
pokemon:bellsprout.summary: Bellsprout’s thin and flexible body lets it bend and sway to avoid any attack, however strong it may be. From its mouth, this Pokémon spits a corrosive fluid that melts even iron.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Bellsprout’s thin and flexible body lets it bend and sway to avoid any attack, however strong it may be. From its mouth, this Pokémon spits a corrosive fluid that melts even iron.
It prefers hot and humid environments. It is quick at capturing prey with its vines.
It prefers hot and humid environments. It is quick at capturing prey with its vines.
A carnivorous POKéMON that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.
If it notices anything that moves, it immediately flings its vine at the object.
It prefers hot and humid environments. It is quick at capturing prey with its vines.
A BELLSPROUT’s thin and flexible body lets it bend and sway to avoid any attack, however strong it may be. From its mouth, it leaks a fluid that melts even iron.
Its bud looks like a human face. Because of the bud, it is rumored to be a type of legendary mandrake plant.
Even though its body is extremely skinny, it is blindingly fast when catching its prey.
Even though its body is extremely skinny, it is blindingly fast when catching its prey.
A carnivorous POKéMON that traps and eats bugs. It appears to use its root feet to replenish moisture.
Prefers hot and humid places. It ensnares tiny bugs with its vines and devours them.
Prefers hot and humid places. It ensnares tiny bugs with its vines and devours them.
Bellsprout’s thin and flexible body lets it bend and sway to avoid any attack, however strong it may be. From its mouth, this Pokémon spits a corrosive fluid that melts even iron.
It prefers hot and humid environments. It is quick at capturing prey with its vines.
It prefers hot and humid environments. It is quick at capturing prey with its vines.
A carnivorous POKéMON that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.
BELLSPROUT’s thin and flexible body lets it bend and sway to avoid any attack, however strong it may be. From its mouth, this POKéMON spits a corrosive fluid that melts even iron.
BELLSPROUT’s thin and flexible body lets it bend and sway to avoid any attack, however strong it may be. From its mouth, this POKéMON spits a corrosive fluid that melts even iron.
It plants its feet deep underground to replenish wa­ ter. It can't es­ cape its enemy while it's rooted.
It plants its feet deep underground to replenish water. It can’t escape its enemy while it’s rooted.
It prefers hot and humid environments. It is quick at capturing prey with its vines.
It prefers hot and humid environments. It is quick at capturing prey with its vines.
Even though its body is extremely skinny, it is blindingly fast when catching its prey.
Its bud looks like a human face. Because of the bud, it is rumored to be a type of legendary mandrake plant.
Prefers hot and humid places. It ensnares tiny insects with its vines and devours them.

pokemon:victreebel.name: Victreebel
pokemon:victreebel.summary: Victreebel has a long vine that extends from its head. This vine is waved and flicked about as if it were an animal to attract prey. When an unsuspecting prey draws near, this Pokémon swallows it whole.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Victreebel has a long vine that extends from its head. This vine is waved and flicked about as if it were an animal to attract prey. When an unsuspecting prey draws near, this Pokémon swallows it whole.
It pools in its mouth a fluid with a honeylike scent, which is really an acid that dissolves anything.
It pools in its mouth a fluid with a honey-like scent, which is really an acid that dissolves anything.
Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.
Once ingested into this POKéMON's body, even the hardest object will melt into nothing.
It pools in its mouth a fluid with a honeylike scent, which is really an acid that dissolves anything.
The long vine extending from its head is waved about as if it were a living thing to attract prey. When an unsuspecting victim approaches, it is swallowed whole.
Lures prey into its mouth with a honeylike aroma. The helpless prey is melted with a dissolving fluid.
ACID that has dis­ solved many prey becomes sweeter, making it even more effective at attracting prey.
Acid that has dissolved many prey becomes sweeter, making it even more effective at attracting prey.
Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.
Lures prey with the sweet aroma of honey. Swallowed whole, the prey is dissolved in a day, bones and all.
Lures prey with the sweet aroma of honey. Swallowed whole, the prey is dissolved in a day, bones and all.

It pools in its mouth a fluid with a honeylike scent, which is really an acid that dissolves anything.

This horrifying plant POKéMON at­ tracts prey with aromatic honey, then melts them in its mouth.
